og_description: Professional clinic website with online booking, doctor schedules, and patient reviews. Create in 5 minutes, no code required.
hero_subtitle: Attract patients and accept online bookings today. No programmers needed.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes

advantages.description: Built-in booking form lets patients choose their doctor and time without calling the reception desk.

advantages.title: Medical-Grade Design

advantages.title: SEO for Clinics
advantages.description: Website optimized for search queries in your city and clinic specialties.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Clinic
how_it_works.description: Enter the name, specialties, and services list — AI will create the website structure.

how_it_works.title: Customize Content
how_it_works.description: Add doctors, schedules, photos, and contacts through a simple editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish Your Site
how_it_works.description: Choose a domain and launch — it's already ready to accept patients.

faq.question: Can I add online booking to the clinic website?
faq.answer: Yes, the online booking form connects in one click. The patient selects a doctor, date, and time, and you receive a notification.

faq.question: How do I display doctor schedules?
faq.answer: The editor has a dedicated schedule block. You specify the days and hours for each doctor's appointments.

faq.question: Is the website suitable for a multi-specialty clinic?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create sections for each department: therapy, surgery, dentistry, and more.

faq.question: Does the website meet requirements for medical organizations?
faq.answer: The site includes all necessary sections: licenses, privacy policy, contacts, and legal information.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a clinic website on Promto?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock additional features: custom domain, advanced analytics, and priority support.

faq.question: Are coding skills required?
faq.answer: No. Promto works completely code-free — you describe the website in words, and AI generates the result.

cta_mid_subtitle: First patients from the internet within hours of publishing.
